title: NORTHWEST ADA CENTER - 211info
text: NORTHWEST ADA CENTER NORTHWEST ADA CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, training, and guidance on the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA), including fact sheets addressing commonly asked questions. 1701 NE Columbia Road Seattle, WA 98195 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (800) 949-4232 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 949-4232 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. In person by appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: ADA Implementation Assistance Disability Awareness Training If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
